history.text: East Bengal appears in Bangladesh's historical record.
East Pakistan appears in Bangladesh's historical record.
The proclamation of independence made Bangladesh's claim to statehood explicit during a decisive political break.
A provisional government was formed during the transition to state rule.
Victory in the Liberation War marked a decisive outcome in Bangladesh's modern political history.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Bangladesh.

worthSeeing.title: Sundarbans:
worthSeeing.text: The world's largest mangrove forest, home to the Bengal tiger, UNESCO-listed.

worthSeeing.title: Chittagong Hill Tracts:
worthSeeing.text: Rolling green hills with Buddhist temples and indigenous tribal cultures.

worthSeeing.title: Cox's Bazar:
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's longest natural sea beaches stretching 120 km.
